preToolUse.powershell: if (Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { bash .github/hooks/deny-destructive-commands.sh } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Bash, Git Bash, or WSL is required to run .github/hooks/deny-destructive-commands.sh on Windows."}' }

if (Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { bash .github/hooks/deny-secret-access.sh } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Bash, Git Bash, or WSL is required to run .github/hooks/deny-secret-access.sh on Windows."}' }

if (Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { bash .github/hooks/deny-git-mutations.sh } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Bash, Git Bash, or WSL is required to run .github/hooks/deny-git-mutations.sh on Windows."}' }
